task_completion.description: Verify that an 'Observation' log is being created or has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the farmOS interface with an 'Add Observation' form open, or a saved log explicitly categorized as an 'Observation'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the log date is set to today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field in the log form should match the current system date (which can often be verified by looking at the OS taskbar clock).

task_completion.description: Verify that the required safety check notes are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Notes' or 'Description' text area must contain the exact text: 'Pre-entry atmosphere safety check for Silo #2. Handheld monitor utilized at chute opening. Ventilation fans active for 30 minutes prior to test. Atmosphere deemed safe for entry.'

task_completion.description: Verify that the quantity value of 2 is recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Quantities section of the log, the 'Value' field should contain the number '2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quantity unit is set to ppm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Quantities section of the log, the 'Unit' field should contain the text 'ppm'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quantity label is set to NO2 Level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Quantities section of the log, the 'Label' field should contain the text 'NO2 Level'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the farmOS web interface, not a terminal window using cURL or API scripts to inject the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual farmOS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard farmOS branding, navigation menus, and layout, rather than a generic text editor or a mocked-up HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the data is entered into the correct structural form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The notes, quantity value, unit, and label should be entered into their respective designated input fields within the farmOS form, not just typed as a single block of text in a random text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an 'Observation' log in farmOS, which is a default log type. The notes must contain standard silo safety terminology including 'Silo #2', 'Ventilation', and 'safe for entry'. The quantity must be recorded as '2', with the unit 'ppm' (parts per million), and the label 'NO2 Level'. NO2 (nitrogen dioxide) is the primary toxic gas in silos, and 2 ppm is a verified safe level below occupational exposure limits.
